title: 7 Managing FX Notes Foreign Exchange Spreads and Transaction Fees
body_text:
7
Managing FX Notes Foreign Exchange Spreads and Transaction Fees
7.1
Accessing the Retail Rate Modifiers Page
Authorized FX Notes Managers can add, update, and delete y
our financial institutionâs foreign exchange spreads (retail rate modifiers) and your transaction fees from the Retail Rate Modifiers page. These FX Notes settings allow you to generate income on each transaction. Any spread or fee that you set up will be included in the amount of the transaction.
Dual authorization is not currently required.
To access the FX Notes Retail Rate Modifiers page:
Log in to FX Notes as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to FX Notes.
Select
Administration
, then
Retail Rate Modifiers
on the left-hand menu. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Navigate to Retail Rate Modifiers
View the Retail Rate Modifiers page. See Figure 2. Add, update, or delete your foreign exchange spreads and transaction fees as described in the following sections.
Figure 2: Retail Rate Modifiers Page
7.2
Adding a Foreign Exchange Spread
To add an FX Notes foreign exchange spread (retail rate modifier):
Navigate to the Retail Rate Modifies page as described in Section 7.1, Accessing the Retail Rate Modifiers Page.
Select
Add Retail Rate Modifiers
. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Select âAdd Retail Rate Modifiersâ
Complete the Create Retail Rate Modifier page, then select
Save Rate Group
. See Figure 4. The new rate is displayed on the Retail Rate Modifiers page.
Figure 4: Complete the Retail Rate Modifier Page
7.3	Updating a Foreign Exchange Spread
To update your FX Notes foreign exchange spread (retail rate modifier):
Navigate to the Retail Rate Modifiers page as described in Section 7.1, Accessing the Retail Rate Modifiers Page.
Select the edit icon beside the rate that you want to modify. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select the Edit Icon
Update the rate information as required, then select
Update Rate Group
. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Update the Rate Group
7.4
Deleting a Foreign Exchange Spread
To delete your foreign exchange spread (retail rate modifier):
Navigate to the Retail Rate Modifiers page as described in Section 7.1, Accessing the Retail Rate Modifiers Page.
Select the delete icon beside the rate that you want to delete. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Select the Delete Icon
Select
Delete
when prompted. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Select âDeleteâ
7.5	Accessing Rates View
For those who are continuing to use a rates sheet rather than live rates, you can download a report periodically throughout the day. However, you must understand that the actual rate will be whatever is in the system at the time the order is entered into the FX Notes application.
Select
Transactional
, then select
Rate Sheet
. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Select âRate Sheetâ
Note:	The rate shown on this page may be different from the live rate you receive at the time of completing an order.
Select
Download to CSV
or
Download to XLSX
in the top-right corner of the page if you want to download the report. See image above. If you want to print the report, use the print function in your browser. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Select âDownload to CSVâ or âDownload to XLSXâ
7.6
Adding a Transaction Fee
To add an FX Notes transaction fee:
Navigate to the Retail Rate Modifies page as described in Section 7.1, Accessing the Retail Rate Modifiers Page.
Select
Add Transaction Fee
. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Select âAdd Transaction Feeâ
Complete the Add Transaction Fee page, then select
Create
. See Figure 12.
The new fee is displayed on the Retail Rate Modifiers page
.
Figure 12: Complete the Add Transaction Fee Page
7.7
Updating a Transaction Fee
To update your FX Notes transaction fee:
Navigate to Retail Rate Modifiers page as described in Section 7.1, Accessing the Retail Rate Modifiers Page.
Select the edit icon beside the fee that you want to modify. See Figure 13.
Figure 13: Select the Edit Icon
Update the fee as required, then select
Update
. See Figure 14.
Figure 14: Update the Fee
7.8	Deleting a Transaction Fee
To delete your transaction fee:
Navigate to the Retail Rate Modifiers page as described in Section 7.1, Accessing the Retail Rate Modifiers Page.
Select the delete icon beside the transaction fee that you want to delete. See Figure 15.
Figure 15: Select the Delete Icon
Select
Delete
when prompted. See Figure 16.
Figure 16: Select âDeleteâ
END
